steps.title: Track Kapoor's warning
steps.content: Kapoor says polling failures should not make campaigns abandon polling, because it still helps strategists during campaigns. The blank needs a word for ignoring or failing to use something.

steps.title: Reject unrelated verbs
steps.content: A means misrepresent, C means add to, and D means put into law. The sentence warns against disregarding election polling entirely after bad predictions. The answer is B.
